verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've been on you for so long I've been praying for you for so long Now you're here beside me I can't imagine, God gave me you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Seeking from a deep deep water Now I found a treasure it's you Oh I love you not because I want you Oh I love you not because your awesome Oh I love you not because I need you But I love you because I see Christ in you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Praise God, He gave me you (4x)
